G/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/matplotlib/tests/test_determinism.py

psFr2
marks)

q&q&d
)	a?
    Output three times the same graphs and checks that the outputs are exactly
    the same.
    Parameters
    ----------
    objects : str
        Objects to be included in the test document: 'm' for markers, 'h' for
        hatch patterns, 'i' for images.
    fmt : {"pdf", "ps", "svg"}
        Output format.
    c

z*test_determinism_check.<locals>.<listcomp>r
z+failed, maybe due to ghostscript timestamps)
pytest

plots
test_determinism_check@
fmt, string)
/CreationDate (D:20000101000000Z))
%%CreationDate: Sat Jan 01 00:00:00 2000c
    Test SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH support. Output a document with the environment
    variable SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH set to 2000-01-01 00:00 UTC and check that the
    document contains the timestamp that corresponds to this date (given as an
    argument).
    Parameters
    ----------
    fmt : {"pdf", "ps", "svg"}
        Output format.
    string : bytes
        Timestamp string for 2000-01-01 00:00 UTC.
    r4
zMfrom matplotlib.tests.test_determinism import _save_figure; _save_figure('', r6
